script_executor_inventory.finding: legacy fixed action chooser and direct tool executor files were deleted; aiweb agent delegates natural-language goals directly to engine-run
fixed build/preview/QA/visual-critique/repair/agent-run pipeline removed; command now delegates to engine-run compatibility metadata only
deterministic local browser probe, not autonomous planning; live schema/code now use probe_generator/probe_plan/probe_results and static audit rejects static_safe_action_plan/scenario_* names
deploy/execution.rb and deploy/provenance.rb were removed; deploy now exposes engine_run_release_evidence release_gate and never uses verify-loop evidence as a deploy unlock path
eval runner no longer reports status=passed when production evidence is missing; expanded fixtures can pass only fixture gate while production_gate_status remains blocked
Brain store now uses append-only JSONL remember/forget events and MemoryAudit exposes SQLite-unavailable operational blocker instead of claiming production-grade persistence

P5 release evidence no longer says Brain safety passed as a broad readiness claim; it reports memory_safety_fixture_passed and remains blocked until a real SQLite/dependency-backed Brain kernel exists.

Redteam::Arena no longer reports generic passed for local catalog fixtures; it exposes catalog_fixture_passed plus production_gate_status=blocked, no independent reviewed cases, and operational blockers.
secret canary runner no longer emits the canary value or generic passed status; it emits a fingerprint, canary_value_emitted=false, and production_gate_status=blocked.

Self-improvement proposals and experiments are explicitly fixture/sandbox-only, production_gate_status=blocked, patch_generated=false, and promotion_allowed=false until real sandbox patch/eval/red-team/HITL/canary/rollback evidence exists.
Release manifest no longer hardcodes local_bin_check_passed; P5/release evidence is blocked until full ruby bin/check, test/all, and CI evidence are attached.

P5 evidence no longer claims all side effects require DecisionPacket/PolicyGateway from a single finish-tool demo; runtime universal side-effect enforcement remains operationally blocked until release-bound broker execution evidence is attached.

script_executor_inventory.surface: P5 static side-effect surface audit evidence
script_executor_inventory.finding: P5 release evidence now attaches the repo static side-effect surface audit with zero unclassified direct execution surfaces, while still blocking runtime universal broker-enforcement claims.
P5 evidence no longer exposes the finish-tool gateway demo as a raw pass; release evidence remains blocked until a full side-effect tool gateway audit is attached.

P5 evidence no longer treats fixture approver/reviewer verification as production HITL readiness; release evidence remains blocked until real operator approval artifact, single-use/expiry consumption proof, and audit trail are attached.

P5 evidence no longer treats a static replay key fixture as side-effect-free replay readiness; release evidence remains blocked until durable replay/resume audit and artifact hash validation evidence are attached.
Static surface audit now blocks stale release-ready, production-ready, broad pass, and fixture-derived readiness claims from returning to P5/release evidence surfaces.
CLI help no longer markets engine-run with Manus wording; static audit keeps help positioned as a supervised local engine-run runtime until stronger operational evidence exists.

Public engine-run contract no longer markets the runtime as Manus wording; static audit blocks product-level Manus wording claims in README and contract surfaces while preserving OpenManus adapter naming.

Codex agent-run no longer owns direct Open3 subprocess execution; approved local source-patch subprocesses route through ProcessRunner/CommandSpec with stdin_data support, still write side-effect broker events, and static side-effect audit has no brokered_agent_run_codex_subprocess entries.

script_executor_inventory.surface: runtime command git revision and preview process-tree direct process forms
script_executor_inventory.finding: runtime_commands no longer owns direct Open3 git revision probes or direct system(taskkill) process-tree cleanup; both route through the central ProcessRunner/CommandSpec boundary, and static side-effect audit has no local_runtime_command_exception or local_process_tree_cleanup entries.

script_executor_inventory.surface: agent-run diff-policy direct git evidence subprocesses
script_executor_inventory.finding: agent_run/diff_policy no longer owns direct Open3 git diff/status subprocesses; git evidence now routes through the central ProcessRunner/CommandSpec boundary, the stale local_read_only_git_evidence documented-exception classifier was removed, and static side-effect audit has no local_read_only_git_evidence entries.

script_executor_inventory.surface: OpenManus readiness direct image inspect subprocess
script_executor_inventory.finding: OpenManus readiness no longer owns direct Open3 image inspect subprocesses; local image inspect now routes through ProcessRunner/CommandSpec with scrubbed env, the stale local_runtime_readiness_probe documented-exception classifier was removed, and static side-effect audit has no local_runtime_readiness_probe entries.

script_executor_inventory.surface: agent-run OpenManus direct image inspect preflight
script_executor_inventory.finding: agent-run OpenManus image preflight no longer owns direct Open3 image inspect subprocesses; image inspect now routes through ProcessRunner/CommandSpec with scrubbed env, the stale openmanus_sandbox_image_preflight documented-exception classifier was removed, and static side-effect audit has no openmanus_sandbox_image_preflight entries.

script_executor_inventory.surface: engine-run sandbox runtime attestation direct Docker/Podman probes
script_executor_inventory.finding: engine_run sandbox container inspect, cleanup, image inspect, and runtime info probes no longer own direct Open3 subprocesses; local Docker/Podman attestation now routes through ProcessRunner/CommandSpec, the stale sandbox_runtime_attestation_exception documented-exception classifier was removed, and static side-effect audit has no sandbox_runtime_attestation_exception entries.

OpenManus agent-run no longer owns direct Open3.popen3 subprocess execution; sandbox worker execution routes through ProcessRunner/CommandSpec with stdin_data support while preserving aiweb-managed Docker/Podman sandboxing, tool-broker evidence, workspace validation, diff validation, and bounded copy-back checks.

engine_run_capture_agent no longer owns direct Open3.popen3 subprocess execution; agent worker execution routes through ProcessRunner/CommandSpec with stdin_data support while preserving staged tool-broker PATH, scrubbed environment, stdout/stderr redaction, timeout handling, and secret-output quarantine checks.

engine_run_capture_command no longer owns direct Open3.capture3 subprocess execution; verification, sandbox preflight, and browser observation capture routes use ProcessRunner/CommandSpec. CommandSpec rejects shell metacharacters by default and requires explicit allow_shell_meta for known literal shell-script argv boundaries.

script_executor_inventory.surface: setup install and supply-chain evidence subprocesses
script_executor_inventory.finding: setup package install, SBOM generation, and package audit no longer own direct Open3.capture3 subprocess execution; commands route through ProcessRunner/CommandSpec while preserving setup side-effect broker events, explicit approval policy, clean child environment, stdout/stderr redaction, SBOM artifacts, package audit evidence, and vulnerability gate behavior.

CodexCliBridge no longer owns direct Open3.popen3 subprocess execution; backend aiweb command execution routes through ProcessRunner/CommandSpec while preserving allowlisted structured commands, backend-controlled flags, side-effect broker evidence, redaction, deploy dry-run blocking, read-only inline broker behavior, and timeout failure events.
